summary: Iter 238 — validated P0 Web Push + cashier-only incoming-call popup + management escalation/reject alerts. Backend 4/4 pytest passing; frontend assertions all pass for admin (no call, mgmt alert visible) and cashier (call visible with accept/reject buttons).
critical_code_review_comments: order_notifications.py /escalations is OPEN (no auth dependency) — escalation/management-alert endpoint is reachable without a token. Acceptable for polling but consider role-gating to avoid exposing branch/cashier names publicly.
escalation upsert uses id=`esc_{order_id}` which is correct for idempotency; verified twice-call does not duplicate.
seed_data_creation: Temporarily seeded order_notifications for FE-CALL-1 (recent unread, cashier popup) and FE-ESC-1 (7-min-old unread, escalation), plus ESC-TEST-X in backend test. All cleaned up after testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test test_management_alerts_iter238.py is reusable as regression. Reads REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL from /app/frontend/.env. Uses /api/auth/login returning {token}. Cleans its own seeds and rejected orders. Frontend: splash ~10s; cashier popup polls every 4s; management alerts every 8s. Branch 76f56acc-... must have an open shift (currently 'مدير النظام') for cashier_name to populate.
rca of the issue: N/A — all features validated as working.
